title: prd-author input envelope
description: Input contract for cuo/cpo/prd-author. The supervisor (or a direct caller) builds an instance of this envelope and passes it to the skill.
_note: manifest_path, caller_persona, trace_id, chain_to, proceed_despite_revise are optional with documented defaults.

brief_path.description: Path to a project_brief@1 markdown. Skill validates frontmatter at PHASE_1; refuses to author if triage_verdict == reject (BOOT-006) or triage_verdict == revise without proceed_despite_revise (BOOT-007).

output_dir.description: Directory the skill MUST write the PRD markdown into. The skill MUST NOT touch any path outside this directory + declared BRAIN scopes.

manifest_path.description: Optional path to a prd-manifest@1 state file (when defined; v0.2.0+). Default: <output_dir>/manifest.json.

proceed_despite_revise.description: If true, allows authoring from a brief with triage_verdict: revise. Caller MUST set this only after explicit user confirmation. Resulting PRD body carries '## Reservations Recorded From Discovery'.

caller_persona.description: Persona ID of the caller. Defaults to 'cuo-cpo' when chained from requirements-discovery; 'cuo' when invoked directly.

chain_to.description: Optional. Default: [] (chain disabled until prd-audit lands at v0.2.5; will default to ['cuo/cpo/prd-audit'] then).
